title: micromeria canariensis subsp. canariensis
intro: Micromeria canariensis subsp. canariensis, also known as Canary Island mint or Hierba Luisa, is a perennial herb native to the Canary Islands and North Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Micromeria canariensis subsp. canariensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
